events.text: Ismaeel Mohammad (Qatar) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Boulaye Dia (Senegal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Qatar 0, Senegal 1. Boulaye Dia (Senegal) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.
Homam Ahmed (Qatar) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Qatar 0, Senegal 2. Famara Diédhiou (Senegal) header from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Ismail Jakobs with a cross   following a corner.
Ismail Jakobs (Senegal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Qatar 1, Senegal 2. Mohammed Muntari (Qatar) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ismaeel Mohammad with a cross.
Goal!  Qatar 1, Senegal 3. Bamba Dieng (Senegal) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Iliman Ndiaye.
Pathé Ciss (Senegal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Assim Madibo (Qatar) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
